query:
SELECT 
  a.direcao,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.descricao) as descricoes_unicas,
  SUM(CAST(p.valorTotal AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as valor_total,
  SUM(CAST(p.valorGlosado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as valor_glosado
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
WHERE a.estabelecimentoId = 1
GROUP BY a.direcao;
command:

  SUM(CAST(p.valorTotal AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as valor_total,

FROM procedimentos p
